session_focus: Turn the remaining dashboard surfaces into real functions instead of decorative cards.
user_directives: Turn the remaining dashboard surfaces into real functions instead of decorative cards.
assistant_responses: Added live Flask endpoints, clickable drilldowns, and repo-backed renderers across the remaining surfaces. Variant 55 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: A dashboard full of static chrome teaches the wrong thing even if the CSS looks finished.

Audit, freeze, stray, trace, steering, bootstrap, repo structure, vector phases, memory files, export, readiness, mutex, and model status were green on hooks but visually thin. Variant 55 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
